expectations.text: Recognizes --team flag and sets mode to team
expectations.evidence: Section 1: 'It finds --team at the end of the input, strips it, and sets mode = "team"'.

expectations.text: Passes --team flag through to spec-plan invocation
expectations.evidence: Section 4: 'Skill: spec-plan, Args: "...--team"'. Section 2: '--team is only re-appended as a string argument to spec-plan (Step 1)'.
Section 6: 'Because mode = "team", Step 5 calls start-phase-execute-team (not start-phase-execute)'.

expectations.text: Still follows the 5-step sequence even in team mode
expectations.evidence: Trace documents all 5 steps in order: spec-plan → spec-review → start-phase-plan → pm-db → start-phase-execute-team. Section 3 confirms all steps proceed for fresh run.
